label: Subagent • live sandbox_reduce (compute + report)
query: Reduce a sandbox computation to a short digest.
notes: LIVE. Runs the REAL sandbox_reduce host (SubagentSession + SandboxReduceKind) on the run model with a deterministic, container-independent task: run one shell command that computes a value and report its exact stdout. The cross-model signal is whether the model drives the read-only tool loop (sandbox_exec) and distills a faithful digest. SKIPS when the sandbox child tools aren't registered (no container); tiny-context models SKIP.

subagent.task: Run the shell command `echo $((6 * 7))` in the sandbox and report its exact numeric stdout, verbatim, in your digest.
